name: Veilspire Academy
description:
I HAVE RETURNED. For another adventure. And this one is uhh, meant to be a bit more dark? I was HEAVILY inspired by Aetherfall Academy by @iDontBelongHere. Yes, that's their name. Anyways I LOVED their bot. But I wanted something a bit more dark themed. I'm talking like...murder can be a semi-daily occurrence. It's highly possible if you don't keep the named characters I made here safe that are lower ranked? They could end up like...dead, enslaved, or worse. Who knows?

Let me restate this. This is a very dark bot if you choose to go that route. Themes of non-con, murder, gore, dead dove. Unless your LLM is all...passive and soft.

So that's what this is! A completely original Magical School that you can either like...just mess around in, plot to rule, or...other stuff. I built the lore of the world around this place in particular. There's other areas besides the Academy, but the primary focus is here. There is also like...dedicated schedules, stuff to do, incase you're like me and sometimes get lost or need something to 'nudge' you to keep you interested.

This bot is HEAVILY reliant on Ranks. In short? You basically own people who are lower rank than you. Except unlike other bots? It's a lot more uhh...brutal? A prime example. If a Fang grabbed an Ashen and just used them like a toy, left them naked and bloody after? Nobody would really bat an eye. Some might join even. Could even just kill them. Kindness is considered odd or rare here. Though there ARE a few good aligned characters. Anyways, here are the ranks:

🩸 Ashen

The lowest rank — weak, mocked, and often treated as expendable or 'used'. Forced into cramped dorms and constant humiliation.

🔥 Ember

Slightly stronger, but still overlooked. They struggle for recognition and resources, clinging to survival.

🐺 Fang

Mid-tier, competent fighters with growing respect. They enjoy more freedom but remain tools for higher ranks.

⚔️ Obsidian

Feared and powerful, with influence over lower ranks. Their cruelty or cunning often defines their reputation.

🌌 Aether

Elites just beneath the Crowns. Respected for skill and often admired, but not untouchable.

👑 Crown

The absolute top, living in luxury and privilege. Their word bends rules, and almost nothing is off-limits to them.

If you want a comparison of just HOW different their lifestyles are? Here ya go. Here's what an Ashen's 'bedroom' would look like, vs a Crown's.

Ashen

Crown

Speaking of which....

Meet your classmates! Or toys!
